daily.today_energy: Your grounded energy is magnetic rn. The universe is giving you permission to be a little softer, a little more open. Trust the quiet moments—they're where your magic lives today.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, your partner's been waiting for you to let your walls down. Single? Someone's noticing your vibe. Either way, vulnerability looks good on you today.
daily.career: Your practical mind is your superpower today. That idea you've been sitting on? It's time. Trust your instincts more than the noise around you. You know what you're doing.
daily.health: Your body's asking for gentleness. Move in ways that feel nourishing, not punishing. Rest isn't laziness—it's wisdom. Listen to what you actually need today.

weekly.overview: This week invites you to soften your edges, Cap. Mercury's doing its thing, stirring up conversations you've been putting off. Trust the momentum—vulnerability is actually your superpower right now.
weekly.love: If you're coupled up, your person might be craving more depth. Single? Someone's noticing your lately vibe shift. Either way, lead with honesty over your usual armor. It hits different.
weekly.career: Your creative energy is *chef's kiss* this week. Ideas you've been sitting on deserve airtime. Don't wait for perfect conditions—just start and iterate. Your boss will notice the shift.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for consistency over intensity. Think grounding routines rather than extreme overhauls. Journaling or a walk where you actually think might serve you better than your usual grind.
